title: Dutch Apple Pudding
description: A delicious dessert that combines the richness of Dutch chocolate pudding with the sweetness of caramelized apples.
instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt.
Add the sliced apples to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the sugar mixture.
Transfer the apple mixture to a baking dish and dot the top with the unsalted butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the apples are tender and caramelized.
While the apples are baking, prepare the Dutch chocolate pudding according to the package instructions.
Once the pudding is cooked, stir in the beaten egg until well combined.
Remove the apples from the oven and pour the warm pudding over the top.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the pudding is set.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool to room temperature.
Serve the Dutch apple pudding chilled, garnished with additional cinnamon if desired.
